question: Model a `Course` class that aggregates `Student` objects. The `Course` class should have a `courseName` (string) and maintain a collection (e.g., `std::vector`) of `Student` objects. Implement methods to add a student to the course and display all enrolled students.

test_cases.expected:
--- Testing Correct Version ---
Successfully added student: David Lee (ID: 301) to Advanced Algorithms.
Successfully added student: Emily Chen (ID: 302) to Advanced Algorithms.

--- Course: Advanced Algorithms ---
Enrolled Students (2):
  - ID: 301, Name: David Lee
  - ID: 302, Name: Emily Chen
---------------------------------

Attempting to add David Lee (ID: 301) again...
Warning: Student with ID 301 (David Lee) is already enrolled in Advanced Algorithms. Not added again.

--- Course: Advanced Algorithms ---
Enrolled Students (2):
  - ID: 301, Name: David Lee
  - ID: 302, Name: Emily Chen
---------------------------------
Successfully added student: Fiona Wang (ID: 303) to Advanced Algorithms.

--- Course: Advanced Algorithms ---
Enrolled Students (3):
  - ID: 301, Name: David Lee
  - ID: 302, Name: Emily Chen
  - ID: 303, Name: Fiona Wang
---------------------------------

--- Course: Linear Algebra ---
  No students enrolled.
---------------------------------
